npl-math.description: Essential math utilities: GCD, LCM, primes, factorial, Fibonacci, clamp, lerp, and more.
npl-math.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-strings.description: String utilities: padding, repetition, truncation, word splitting, and more.
npl-strings.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-collections.description: Collection utilities: zip, flatten, chunk, unique, frequencies, group_by, take, drop, range.
npl-collections.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-datetime.description: Date/time helpers built on top of the now() / format_time() / parse_time() stdlib.
npl-datetime.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-http-client.description: HTTP client wrapper with retries, headers, and JSON helpers.
npl-http-client.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-http-server.description: HTTP server with routing, middleware, and JSON response helpers.
npl-http-server.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-json-schema.description: JSON schema validation for Txtcode maps and arrays.
npl-json-schema.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-csv.description: CSV read/write utilities with header mapping and type coercion.
npl-csv.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-env.description: .env file loader — reads KEY=VALUE pairs into environment variables.
npl-env.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-semver.description: Semantic versioning: parse, compare, and satisfy version constraints.
npl-semver.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-base64.description: Base64 encode/decode thin wrapper with URL-safe variant.
npl-base64.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-uuid.description: UUID generation (v4) and validation thin wrapper.
npl-uuid.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-retry.description: Retry logic with exponential backoff and jitter.
npl-retry.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-assert.description: Extended assertion utilities: assert_throws, assert_approx, assert_contains.
npl-assert.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-cli-args.description: CLI argument parsing helpers: flags, options, positional args.
npl-cli-args.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-colors.description: Terminal color output using ANSI escape codes.
npl-colors.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-table.description: Print data as formatted ASCII tables in the terminal.
npl-table.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-hash.description: Consistent hashing: murmur3, fnv1a, djb2 for fast non-crypto hashing.
npl-hash.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-path.description: Advanced path manipulation: glob, walk, relative, normalize.
npl-path.author: Txtcode Core Team
